titleStmt.title: SII 39.61: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 61. (A.R. No. 61 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. •••••••••• ŚAKA 1432 (1510 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription states that the assigning of the duty of Kāval rights of certain villages like Vēlaṅguḍi and Suṇḍaikāttūr in Pūṅkuṉṟanāḍu, to three groups of watchmen (pādikāppāṟ), including Sivandeḻundārāṉa Sundarapāṇḍiyaṉ of Kaḻaṉivāsalin kulaśēkharapuram alias Ilaiyāttaṅguḍi in Kalvāsalnādu, Sivanda-kālaḻagiyārāṉa-chēdirāyar and Pāṇḍyaperumāḷ-piḷḷaiyār of Eḻagapperunderu alias Vīrapāṇḍiyapuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti cakāttam 1000 4 100 3 10 2 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa vipa varuṣam cittirai mātam 2 § kalvācal nāṭṭu Iḷaiyāttakkuṭi
yāṉa kulacekarapurattu kaḻaṉivācaluṭaiyāṇ civanteḻuntārāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaṇiyamāṉarum meṟpaṭi
Āvuṭaiyārāṉa kaṇakarāyarum meṟpaṭi kuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ civanta kālaḻakiyarāṉa cetiyarrāyarum
Eḻukap perunteruvāṉ virapāṇṭiya purattu kaḻanivācaluṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭiyaperumāḷ
piḷḷaiyārum Omaten paṟṟu pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu velaṅkuṭi cuṇṭaik kāṭṭūr pātu kāp
pāṟkum tirukkurampūr Ātitte kāppiṟkum vaṭapaṟṟu cevvalūr pātu kāppāṟkum nāṅkaḷ
kāval cuvantiram kalveṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭi nāṅkaḷ puṟamalai nāṭṭu tuvarrūril Avar Avare koṇ
ṭuṭaiya kāṇiyāṭci Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavukkum panṉiraṇṭāṉ kūṭaṟṟile Orumānilattukku Ūṟkoru kaṭṭāka mūṉṟu
kaṭṭum Iṭṭu Ūṟku kuṟuṇiyāka ṟuk kuṟuṇiyum Iṭṭu poka kaṭavomākavum Eṅkaḷukku tuvārūravarāl kāriyam
kiramum peṟṟup potuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku cuntarapāṇṭiya vaṇika māṉār coṟpaṭikkum Āvuṭaiyārā
ṉa kaṉakarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku civantakālaḻakiyarāṉa cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
pāṇṭipperumāḷ piḷḷaiyār Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
